block_00: Aroon — The Indicator That Measures Time, Not Money
block_01: Time is money. And in the case of the Aroon indicator, this is especially true. This tool measures the time it takes for the price to reach its highest or lowest point over a certain period of time.
block_02: As a trend indicator, Aroon allows traders to identify likely trend reversal points, consolidations, and correction periods. It is an indicator you’ll surely want to add to your trading arsenal.
